underlying_goal: Implement RSS reader article filtering functionality with filter rules, external service integration, and SSO login
friction_detail: User had trouble starting the development servers (port conflicts, confusion about pnpm dev commands) but this was environmental not caused by Claude.
brief_summary: User requested implementation of RSS article filtering system with database models, services, routes, and frontend UI, then button styling update, then SSO login integration - all were implemented but testing was interrupted before completion verification.
